ideation: This animation sequence depicts the robot operating a tractor, emphasizing the gripping and steering actions.  The sequence will focus on the robot's arms mimicking the actions of holding onto the steering wheel and operating the controls. We'll use a 4-frame sequence to capture the key moments of this activity. Frame 1 shows the robot's arms in a neutral position, ready to start working. Frame 2 shows the robot gripping the steering wheel, with arms slightly bent and hands positioned on the imaginary wheel. Frame 3 shows the robot adjusting the steering, turning the imaginary wheel slightly to one side. Frame 4 shows the robot returning to a neutral position after completing a turn. The left arm will represent gripping while the right arm will be steering.

frames.beat: arms rest, ready to drive the tractor
gripping the wheel, ready to steer
turning the wheel, guiding the tractor
arms return to neutral, the turn is complete
